title: Saalai
overview: Saalai (The Road), the story of one man's inner struggle, a Psychological Thriller based on an Idea driven by strange encounters, shot in -30°C FREEZING COLD and DANGEROUS landscape presented for the first ever time in Tamil Cinema.
